ladder.title: Live Ladder
ladder.body: Core + Pro active. Rankings load via leaderboard service.
ladder.bodyRemote: Firestore connected — summary rows, client cache, hourly upload limits.
ladder.bodyLocalMock: Firebase env unset — in-memory mock data for development.
ladder.noNetworkNote: Non-Pro accounts never hit Firestore on this route.
ladder.loadError: Could not load rankings. Check Firebase rules and indexes.
ladder.empty: No pilots on this shard — be first upload.
ladder.strengthKgShardHint: Ranking uses SBD estimated 1RM (kg). Re-save all three lifts and sync to refresh legacy rows.

floatingRank.cta: Tap to Jump to My Row

userPreview.title: User Details
userPreview.error: Unable to load user. Try again later.
userPreview.radarHiddenAnonymous: Pilot hides ladder identity — radar not shown.
userPreview.driftWarning: Listed score ({{listed}}) does not match the public six-axis average ({{preview}}). Run Sync to Ladder again to refresh your overall entry.

gate.no-score: Save score to radar first, then upload here.
gate.signed-out: Sign in with Google to upload scores.
gate.anonymous: Link Google account (not guest-only) to upload.
gate.no-pro: Pro subscription required for live ladder upload.

upload.resultUnchanged: Score matches cloud — no upload quota used this hour.
upload.quotaHint: Up to {{limit}} writes per shard per hour (rolling window).
upload.quotaAfterSuccess: {{remaining}} write(s) left this hour for this shard ({{limit}}/hour); refreshes at {{resetTime}}.
upload.quotaAfterUnchanged: {{remaining}} write(s) left this hour for this shard ({{limit}}/hour); refreshes at {{resetTime}}.
upload.resultAvatarUploadFailed: Avatar could not upload to the cloud, so ladder sync was skipped. Check your connection and try again.
upload.resultError: Upload failed. Check connection or Firebase rules.

auth.title: Sign In Required
auth.body: Google sign-in first, then upload and sync to ladder.

pro.title: Pro Required
pro.body: Pro-only feature. Upgrade to upload and join live ladder.

devWriteMode.clientDirectWarning: ⚠️ Client direct-write mode (rules block writes — check .env and restart dev)

syncAll.hint: Upload overall and every eligible shard from your radar and assessments.
syncAll.advancedTip:
Sync uploads every eligible shard in sequence with these limits:

- Up to {{limit}} counted writes per shard per hour (rolling 60 minutes).
- When the score matches the cloud value, no write occurs and no quota is used.
- When the score changes (higher or lower), the row is updated and 1 write is counted.
- Full sync itself has cooldown: roughly once every 90 minutes, up to 3 times per day.
- Shards with incomplete tests, no radar value, or Non‑Pro access are skipped or blocked.
syncAll.noTargets: No scores ready — complete assessments or save to radar first.
syncAll.summary: Processed {{attempted}} shards: {{updated}} written, {{unchanged}} unchanged, {{avatarPatched}} portrait updated, {{rateLimited}} rate limited, {{proRequired}} Pro blocked, {{invalidInput}} invalid, {{internal}} system errors ({{errors}} total errors).

failureReason.avatar-upload-failed: Avatar upload failed (Storage unavailable or permission denied)

syncAll.fullSyncCooldown: Full sync is on cooldown. Try again after {{resetTime}}.
syncAll.fullSyncDailyCap: Daily full sync limit reached (3 per day). Use per-page uploads, or try again after {{resetTime}}.
syncAll.preflightBlocked: Sync did not run — see details below.
syncAll.avatarPortraitUpdated: Score unchanged — portrait synced to ladder (including overall board).

assessmentSync.hint: After you calculate, sync this page's shards, overall score, and public six-axis profile—no need to write to the dashboard first.
assessmentSync.advancedTip: Uploads this page's shards plus overall score and public six-axis preview in one run (does not count toward full-sync cooldown; no dashboard radar write required). Skipped when scores missing, ineligible, or rate-limited.
assessmentSync.noTargets: No scores on this page ready to upload.
assessmentSync.noTargetsTap: Calculate a valid score on this page first, then sync to ladder.
assessmentSync.successSummary: Updated this page's shards, overall score, and public six-axis profile.
